title: desmodium tortuosum
intro: Desmodium tortuosum, also known as tick clover or beggar's lice, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States and the West Indies. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Desmodium tortuosum include its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, from skin conditions to digestive issues.
